title: Warm Syrian Flour Flatbread
description: A fatty, crispy flatbread made quick with extra virgin olive oil and no sugar, perfect for a warm snack.
instructions: In a bowl whisk together flour, salt, and yeast until evenly distributed.
Create a well in the center and pour in water and olive oil; mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover with a cloth, and let rise for 45 minutes.
Punch down the dough, divide it into six equal portions, and roll each into a 10cm flat circle.
Heat a dry skillet over medium-high heat, cook each flatbread 2-3 minutes per side until golden and crisp.
